All your people and AI agents working together.
Slack connects your team. Slackbot multiplies what they can do.
Get started

Trusted by top teams
Ask Slackbot
Plan launches
Run projects

Automate tasks
Ask Slackbot
Plan launches
Run projects
Chat with clients
Automate tasks
Reimagine what’s possible with AI and agents.
AI in Slack doesn’t make you think, it helps you do. It summarizes and searches based on actual conversations, and with it, makes every app and agent more helpful and contextually aware than ever.
Update deals just by asking Slackbot
NEW

Get fast answers with Claude
NEW

What’s new in Slack
See all updates
Link may open in new tab
New Feature
Partner Apps MCP
Connect your favorite tools directly to Slackbot to surface live data and rich interactive content right in your conversation.
Link may open in new tab
New Feature
Slackbot MCP
Slackbot uses MCP to reach the tools your team already runs on — Google, Atlassian, Box, Notion, DocuSign, and more — so one conversation can pull from your entire stack.
Link may open in new tab
New Feature
Slackbot Memory
Other AI remembers what you told it.
Link may open in new tab
New Feature
Slackbot Voice Dictation
For the employee who never opened Slackbot because typing felt like one more thing, you can now just say it out loud.
Link may open in new tab
New Feature
Slackbot Native Charts
Numbers buried in a message are easy to miss.
Link may open in new tab
Feature Enhancement
Group DM Naming
Users have wanted to name their group DMs since they launched in 2015.
Link may open in new tab
Feature Enhancement
Sidebar Filter
Just start typing and your channel list narrows in real time.
Knowledge
People
Process
Platform
Knowledge
Give everyone instant context.
Get access to every file, decision, and conversation, so you can build on past work instead of recreating it.
Meet Slackbot: Your personal agent for work.
Slackbot isn't just any AI. It's AI that knows you and your team. It coordinates work across your apps and agents so one conversation gets work done.
Learn more about Slackbot
One search to rule them all.
AI-powered search puts your company’s entire memory at your fingertips.
Learn about AI-powered search
Bring CRM data to the conversation.
Customer insights now live alongside conversations, so deals keep moving forward.
Learn about Salesforce in Slack
97 min
average time users can save weekly with AI in Slack
1
People
Let your people connect like people.
Slack’s conversational UI makes collaborating more approachable, whether you're working with a colleague or an agent.
It all starts with a channel.
Channels are flexible, transparent spaces for working with your team, AI assistants, and agents.
Learn about channels
When talking is easier than typing…
…hop on a huddle, our built-in video tool. With AI in Slack, your meeting notes take themselves.
Learn about huddles
Bring conversations out of the inbox.
Slack Connect lets you chat with clients and vendors in real-time, right from Slack. Email could never.
Learn about Slack connect
“Slack has been essential to our growth, our speed, and our ability to stay aligned as we scale”
Kate Jenson,
Head of Americas, Anthropic
Process
Manage all your work from one place.
Automate daily stand-ups, project updates, and approvals so your team can focus on growth instead of guesswork.
Anyone can automate in Slack.
By click or by code, Slack makes it easy for anyone to build time-saving automations of their own.
Learn about workflows
Manage projects and tasks.
Track. Approve. Mark as complete. All without leaving the conversation.
Learn about lists
A simpler way to get started.
Project manager's block? Beginning a brief? There’s a template for that.
See all templates
35%
increase in time saved due to automations for Slack users
2
Platform
Secure. Scaleable. Silo-free.
Our flexible, open platform is purpose-built for bringing the best agents and AI to every business, and can be tailored to fit however your teams work best.
From Atlassian to Zoom.
Google Drive. ChatGPT. Vercel. Box. Asana. Workday. You name it, it works in Slack.
See all integrations
Customize Slack to fit your needs.
Our platform is flexible so you can build solutions specific to your business.
Learn about dev tools
Work without worry.
If it’s shared in Slack, it’s safe. Our security program protects your data at every layer.
Learn about security
“Work starts in conversation. That’s why we see Slack as the natural place to build our agents.”
Guillermo Rauch,
CEO, Vercel
The most innovative companies run their business in Slack.
Slackbot helps MrBeast create viral videos.
Slack helps Box bring agents to every employee
Caraway Brings All The Right Ingredients Together In Slack
Slack helps Rivian do business in the fast lane

We use three kinds of cookies on our websites: required, functional, and advertising. You can choose whether functional and advertising cookies apply. Click on the different cookie categories to find out more about each category and to change the default settings.

Always Active

Choose a paid plan built for businesses.
Or start with the basics for free, and upgrade at any time.
Get help choosing a plan
The world’s leading businesses rely on Slack
Find your perfect Slack plan
Five questions. One perfect plan. Let’s go!
How many people will be using Slack?
👉
Select one:
Just me or a small team (under 10)
A growing team or department (10–500)
A large organization (500+)
Do you work with people outside your company?
👉
Select one:
Nope — everything’s in-house
Sometimes — DMs to a few external contacts
Yes — we work with external partners in shared channels
How important is access to your full message history?
👉
Select one:
Not very — we only need recent messages, 90 days is fine
Very — we want our entire conversation history to be searchable for context
Does your team ever struggle to catch up on what they’ve missed?
👉
Select one:
Not really — we stay on top of things
Sometimes — but a quick summary would help
Yes — we want to summarize channels, search conversation histories, and more
How much security and IT control does your team need?
👉
Select one:
Standard login or Google sign-in works fine
Advanced control — single sign-on, user provisioning and compliance exports
Strict requirements — multi-workspace management, data loss prevention, and HIPAA compliance
Thinking...
One moment. We take plan-matching seriously.
⭐
Top pick
Slack Free is a great place to start
Everything you need to hit the ground running. Connect with your team, get work done, and upgrade whenever you're ready.
Get Started
→
⭐
Top pick
Slack Pro sounds like a perfect fit
Unlimited message history, easy collaboration with people outside your org, and everything a growing team needs to do its best work.
Get Started
→
⭐
Top pick
Slack Business+ is built for teams like yours
Powerful AI features, stronger security, and the reliability your team needs — without the complexity that comes with going enterprise.
Get Started
→
⭐
Top pick
Slack Enterprise+ is made for your scale
Slack's most powerful and secure plan — with centralized management, compliance tools, and the flexibility to run Slack across your entire organization.
Contact Sales

New
Your personal AI agent that understands conversations, files, and projects in Slack. Plan limits apply.
AI workflow generation
Build workflows from a single prompt with the power of Slack AI and Workflow Builder.
Enterprise search
Search across connected apps, databases, and systems with enterprise search.
AI daily recaps
Get a daily digest of what’s happening across all of your teams and projects.
AI file summaries
Catch up on documents in a flash with smart AI summaries of files shared in Slack.
Multiple SAML configurations
Sign in with your IDP of choice. Supports 12 SSO options including Okta, Google, and Azure.
SCIM user management
Slack supports member provisioning with SCIM. Use a connector app and supported identity provider.
EMM integration support
Control mobile data with Enterprise Mobility Management like VMware AirWatch or Ivanti MobileIron.
Native data loss prevention
Data loss prevention in Slack Connect scans messages and files sent by members of your organization to reduce the risk of sharing confidential, malicious, or personally identifiable content with external orgs.

Terms & Conditions
To be eligible for this limited-time offer, you must be purchasing the Slack Pro or Business+ plan online within the first 7 days of creating your team. For more information on Slack’s plans and features, see
here

. This 50% discount will only apply for the first 3 months from the date of your eligible upgraded plan (the “Discount Period”). After the Discount Period, Slack’s standard pricing will apply to the remainder of your plan and to any plan renewals.
By redeeming this offer, you agree that these offer terms form part of and modify Slack’s
Customer Terms of Service

(or the terms of your written agreement regarding your use of Slack’s services) (your “Agreement”) entered into between you and the Slack entity identified in the Agreement and that, after the Discount Period, Slack’s then-current standard pricing set forth on Slack’s
Pricing Page

will apply to the remainder of your plan and to any plan renewals. Please see the terms of your Agreement for information on how to cancel or downgrade your paid subscription prior to any such renewal. If you redeem this offer and then cancel your paid Slack plan or downgrade to a free plan during the Discount Period, this offer may no longer be available to you.
This offer cannot be combined with any other offer. Limit one offer per customer. Offer is non-transferable. This offer does not apply to annual plans or to upgrades to Slack’s Enterprise+ Plan. If you are interested in the Enterprise+ Plan, you can
contact our Sales team

Slack 4.50.143
June 23, 2026
Security Guidance
This release includes security improvements. Updating is recommended.
Slack 4.50.140
June 15, 2026
Security Guidance
This release includes security improvements. Updating is recommended.
Slack 4.50.128
May 26, 2026
Bug Fixes
Thanks for updating the app! This round’s changes don’t lend themselves to tidy summaries, but we’re doing all that we can to make sure the app is running as smoothly as possible. Here’s to incremental gains!
Slack 4.49.89
April 28, 2026
Bug Fixes
Everything is an itty-bitty bit better than it was before. Trust us.
Slack 4.49.81
April 2, 2026
Bug Fixes
Ever have those weeks when it feels like nothing’s happening, but then you look back later and realize a lot of things actually were happening? This is one of those weeks for the app.
Slack 4.48.102
March 17, 2026
Security Guidance
This release includes security improvements. Updating is recommended.
Slack 4.48.100
March 5, 2026
Security Guidance
This release includes minor security improvements. Updating is beneficial.
Slack 4.48.99
March 4, 2026
Security Guidance
This release includes minor security improvements. Updating is beneficial.
Slack 4.48.95
February 19, 2026
Bug Fixes
We tidied the shelves, cleaned the windows and ran a white-gloved finger over every flat surface. Just a little routine maintenance to ensure that everything is shipshape. Full steam ahead!
Slack 4.48.94
February 18, 2026
Security Guidance
This release includes minor security improvements. Updating is beneficial.
Slack 4.48.92
February 13, 2026
Bug Fixes
Hard work is happening this week, but nothing we can easily describe. It’s like a duck swimming on a pond. Under the water, the duck is paddling furiously, but on top all that can be seen is the gentle gliding of a bird on water. This week, Slack is the duck.
Slack 4.47.72
December 12, 2025
Security Guidance
This release includes minor security improvements. Updating is beneficial.
Slack 4.47.69
December 8, 2025
Bug Fixes
Don’t mind us — just making a few small adjustments to keep the app in tip-top shape. More to come soon. Cheerio!
Slack 4.47.65
November 24, 2025
Security Guidance
This release includes security improvements. Updating is recommended.
Slack 4.47.59
November 10, 2025
Bug Fixes
Bugs were squashed, performance was improved, work was done, and the result was good. Please enjoy Slack responsibly.
Slack 4.46.104
October 21, 2025
Bug Fixes
All bugs that were fixed in this release were too small for the eye to see or too fiddly for human words to describe. Nevertheless, work was done, things tinkered with and the app became subtly better.
Slack 4.46.101
October 6, 2025
Bug Fixes
A little reminder as you go about your day: The world is a more unique place simply because you’re a part of it, and you’ve affected others in ways you can’t imagine. Oh, and no big changes to the app this time. Happy messaging!
Slack 4.46.99
September 22, 2025
Security Guidance
This release includes security improvements. Updating is recommended.
Slack 4.46.96
September 10, 2025
Bug Fixes
We cleaned the code to make sure that everything’s running smoothly. Slack — now with a streak-free shine.
Slack 4.45.69
August 19, 2025
Security Guidance
This release includes security improvements. Updating is recommended.
Slack 4.45.64
July 21, 2025
Bug Fixes
This week’s is not a huge update, but let that not convince you it’s unimportant. They can’t all be red-letter days (or updates), but each day we’re here is a good one. This update is a good one too.
Slack 4.45.60
July 14, 2025
Bug Fixes
A little reminder as you go about your day: The world is a more unique place simply because you’re a part of it, and you’ve affected others in ways you can’t imagine. Oh, and no big changes to the app this time. Happy messaging!
Slack 4.44.65
June 9, 2025
Security Guidance
This release includes security improvements. Updating is recommended.
Slack 4.44.63
June 2, 2025
Bug Fixes
All bugs that were fixed in this release were too small for the eye to see or too fiddly for human words to describe. Nevertheless, work was done, things tinkered with and the app became subtly better.
Slack 4.44.60
May 19, 2025
Bug Fixes
The app is objectively better today than it was yesterday. This is a scientifically verifiable fact that cannot be challenged or undermined. We appreciate you staying up to date!
Slack 4.44.59
May 5, 2025
Bug Fixes
Ever have those weeks when it feels like nothing’s happening, but then you look back later and realize a lot of things actually were happening? This is one of those weeks for the app.
Slack 4.43.52
April 17, 2025
Bug Fixes
Don’t mind us — just making a few small adjustments to keep the app in tip-top shape. More to come soon. Cheerio!
Slack 4.43.51
March 31, 2025
Security Guidance
This release includes security improvements. Updating is recommended.
Slack 4.43.49
March 20, 2025
Bug Fixes
We’ve sanded down some rough patches in the app so as to avoid any digital splinters. Did you know "digital splinters" were a thing? They are now, but they aren’t anything you’ll need to worry about.
Slack 4.43.44
March 10, 2025
Bug Fixes
We tidied the shelves, cleaned the windows and ran a white-gloved finger over every flat surface. Just a little routine maintenance to ensure that everything is shipshape. Full steam ahead!
Security Guidance
This release includes security improvements. Updating is recommended.
Slack 4.42.120
February 17, 2025
What’s New
Starting with this version, Slack has changed our company registration in the MacOS desktop signing certificate from SLACK TECHNOLOGIES INC to SLACK TECHNOLOGIES, LLC following a similar change to our Windows desktop signing certificate in 2023. This change has been updated with our certificate registrar, and SLACK TECHNOLOGIES, LLC is the valid and correct publisher for new versions of Slack. If you’re suddenly seeing Slack being flagged by anti-virus software, the new binary and publisher name may need to be allowlisted by your company’s security policies. Many thanks for your understanding!
Slack 4.42.117
February 3, 2025
Bug Fixes
Minor tinkerings and tune-ups across the app. We appreciate your staying up to date! Let us know if you run into any problems by dropping us a line at
feedback@slack.com
.
Slack 4.42.115
January 21, 2025
Bug Fixes
Like a runner steadily improving their split times, this update is the sort that’s less showy but no less important. You’ll find the app a little faster, a little leaner, a little closer to the goal.
Slack 4.41.105
December 9, 2024
Bug Fixes
No big fixes to call out this week, but rest assured, there will be more in the future. Not that introducing bugs is our aim, of course. But missteps, adjustments, errors, and corrections — these are the rhythms of life and the price of growth. We hope you’re enjoying the ride, no matter where you happen to find yourself at present.
Slack 4.41.104
December 2, 2024
Bug Fixes
Hard work is happening this week, but nothing we can easily describe. It’s like a duck swimming on a pond. Under the water, the duck is paddling furiously, but on top all that can be seen is the gentle gliding of a bird on water. This week, Slack is the duck.
Slack 4.41.98
November 21, 2024
Bug Fixes
We tuned up the engine and gave the interiors a thorough clean. Everything is now running smoothly again.
Slack 4.41.97
October 24, 2024
Bug Fixes
We tuned up the engine and gave the interiors a thorough clean. Everything is now running smoothly again.
Slack 4.41.96
October 22, 2024
What’s New
Starting with version 4.41, Slack for macOS will also be available in PKG format. Please see https://slack.com/help/articles/360035635174-Deploy-Slack-for-macOS for more details.
Slack 4.40.133
October 10, 2024
Bug Fixes
Bugs were squashed, performance was improved, work was done, and the result was good. Please enjoy Slack responsibly.
Security Guidance
This release includes minor security improvements. Updating is beneficial.
Slack 4.40.128
September 12, 2024
Bug Fixes
Nothing major to report this week. Nothing minor to report either, as it turns out. Work is still happening, mind you — it’s just more the sort that happens behind the curtain in between scenes at a play. We’re quietly setting the stage for what’s to come.
Slack 4.40.126
September 5, 2024
Bug Fixes
All bugs that were fixed in this release were too small for the eye to see or too fiddly for human words to describe. Nevertheless, work was done, things tinkered with and the app became subtly better.
Security Guidance
This release includes minor security improvements. Updating is beneficial.
Slack 4.40.120
August 27, 2024
Bug Fixes
We’ve tinkered with the internal workings and polished some rough edges. The app is now better than it was.
Slack 4.39.95
July 29, 2024
Bug Fixes
All bugs that were fixed in this release were too small for the eye to see or too fiddly for human words to describe. Nevertheless, work was done, things tinkered with and the app became subtly better.
Slack 4.39.90
July 8, 2024
Bug Fixes
The app is objectively better today than it was yesterday. This is a scientifically verifiable fact that cannot be challenged or undermined. We appreciate you staying up to date!
Slack 4.39.88
June 17, 2024
Bug Fixes
Users on macOS Monterey and later who were running the App Store version of Slack noticed that they were unable to share their screen, seeing prompts to enab

Privacy Preference Center
We use three kinds of cookies on our websites: required, functional, and advertising. You can choose whether functional and advertising cookies apply. Click on the different cookie categories to find out more about each category and to change the default settings.
More information
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Required Cookies
Always Active
Required cookies are necessary for basic website functionality. Some examples include: session cookies needed to transmit the website, authentication cookies, and security cookies.
Cookies Details
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
Functional cookies enhance functions, performance, and services on the website. Some examples include: cookies used to analyze site traffic, cookies used for market research, and cookies used to display advertising that is not directed to a particular individual.
Cookies Details
Advertising Cookies
Advertising Cookies
Advertising cookies track activity across websites in order to understand a viewer’s interests, and direct them specific marketing. Some examples include: cookies used for remarketing, or interest-based advertising.

hits.title: Slack has raised our charges by $195k per year
Slack’s new WYSIWYG input box is terrible
Use forums rather than Slack/Discord to support developer community

Slack Is Buying HipChat from Atlassian

analysis.name: Slack
analysis.tagline: All your people and AI agents working together.
analysis.value_proposition: AI-powered work platform combining team messaging, channels, huddles, and agentic AI to unify collaboration and workflows.
analysis.ideal_customer: Cross-functional teams and enterprises seeking a channel-based collaboration hub augmented with AI agents and deep third-party integrations.

features.name: channels
features.description: Persistent topic/team-based conversation spaces to organize work.
features.evidence_quote: Channels — Organize teams and work

features.name: slack connect
features.description: Shared channels with external partners and customers.
features.evidence_quote: Slack Connect — Work with external partners

features.name: messaging
features.description: Direct and channel-based team chat.
features.evidence_quote: Messaging — Chat with your team

features.name: huddles
features.description: Lightweight audio and video meetings inside Slack.
features.evidence_quote: Huddles — Meet with audio and video

features.name: clips
features.description: Record and share short audio/video updates asynchronously.
features.evidence_quote: Clips — Record and share updates

features.name: canvas
features.description: Rich, flexible collaborative documents inside Slack.
features.evidence_quote: Canvas — Create rich, flexible docs

features.name: lists
features.description: Organize, track, and manage projects with structured lists.
features.evidence_quote: Lists — Organize, track and manage projects

features.name: templates
features.description: Pre-built templates for common tasks and workflows.
features.evidence_quote: Templates — Start any task, fast

features.name: file sharing
features.description: Upload and share files in the flow of work.
features.evidence_quote: File Sharing — Bring files to the flow of work

features.name: workflow builder
features.description: No-code automation for everyday tasks.
features.evidence_quote: Workflow Builder — Automate everyday tasks

features.name: apps & integrations
features.description: Connect third-party tools via Slack Marketplace.
features.evidence_quote: Apps & Integrations — Connect your tools with Slack

features.name: agentic platform
features.description: Extensible platform to customize, extend, and unify your tech stack via agents.
features.evidence_quote: Agentic Platform — Customize, extend, and unify your tech stack in Slack

features.name: ai in slack
features.description: Built-in AI for summarization, search, and productivity.
features.evidence_quote: AI in Slack — Save time and work smarter with powerfully simple AI

features.name: slackbot
features.description: Personal AI agent that plans, summarizes, and automates tasks.
features.evidence_quote: Slackbot — Power productivity with your personal AI agent

features.name: agentforce
features.description: AI-powered team-wide agents integrated into Slack.
features.evidence_quote: Agentforce — Empower your whole team with AI-powered agents in Slack

features.name: enterprise search
features.description: Unified search across Slack and connected sources.
features.evidence_quote: Enterprise Search — Find anything, all from a single search bar

features.name: conversation summaries
features.description: AI summaries of missed conversations and channels.
features.evidence_quote: Summarize a conversation you missed

features.name: ai note-taking in huddles
features.description: Automatic AI-generated notes from huddle audio.
features.evidence_quote: Turn on AI note-taking in huddles

features.name: partner apps mcp
features.description: Connect favorite tools to Slackbot via MCP for live data.
features.evidence_quote: Partner Apps MCP — Connect your favorite tools directly to Slackbot

features.name: slackbot mcp
features.description: Slackbot uses MCP to reach Google, Atlassian, Box, Notion, DocuSign, and more.
features.evidence_quote: Slackbot uses MCP to reach the tools your team already runs on

features.name: slackbot memory
features.description: Persistent memory for Slackbot across conversations.
features.evidence_quote: Slackbot Memory — Other AI remembers what you told it.

features.name: slackbot voice dictation
features.description: Voice input to Slackbot for hands-free interaction.
features.evidence_quote: Slackbot Voice Dictation — you can now just say it out loud

features.name: salesforce integration
features.description: Native Salesforce data and workflows in Slack.
features.evidence_quote: Salesforce in Slack — Bring Salesforce into the flow of work

features.name: slack crm for small business
features.description: Lightweight CRM inside Slack powered by Slackbot.
features.evidence_quote: Slack CRM for Small Business — Manage customers in Slack

features.name: claude integration
features.description: Anthropic Claude available for fast answers in Slack.
features.evidence_quote: Get fast answers with Claude

features.name: github copilot integration
features.description: Code review powered by GitHub Copilot in Slack.
features.evidence_quote: Review code with Github Copilot

features.name: security
features.description: Data protection and compliance controls.
features.evidence_quote: Security — Protect data, ensure compliance

features.name: enterprise key management
features.description: Customer-managed keys with monitor/revoke access.
features.evidence_quote: Enterprise Key Management — Monitor and revoke access

features.name: slack atlas
features.description: Rich employee profiles and org charts.
features.evidence_quote: Slack Atlas — Discover rich profiles and org charts

features.name: sso
features.description: Single sign-on for authentication.
features.evidence_quote: Advanced control — single sign-on, user provisioning and compliance exports

features.name: scim user provisioning
features.description: Automated user provisioning.
features.evidence_quote: single sign-on, user provisioning and compliance exports

features.name: compliance exports
features.description: Export message history for compliance.
features.evidence_quote: single sign-on, user provisioning and compliance exports

features.name: data loss prevention
features.description: DLP controls for sensitive data.
features.evidence_quote: multi-workspace management, data loss prevention, and HIPAA compliance

features.name: hipaa compliance
features.description: HIPAA-compliant deployment for regulated industries.
features.evidence_quote: multi-workspace management, data loss prevention, and HIPAA compliance

features.name: multi-workspace management
features.description: Manage multiple Slack workspaces under one org.
features.evidence_quote: multi-workspace management, data loss prevention, and HIPAA compliance

features.name: unlimited message history
features.description: Full searchable history on paid plans.
features.evidence_quote: Slack Pro sounds like a perfect fit — Unlimited message history

features.name: slack marketplace
features.description: Discover and install new agents and apps.
features.evidence_quote: Slack Marketplace — Find new agents and apps that fit your team's needs

features.name: slack status page
features.description: Public status page for service health.
features.evidence_quote: Slack Status

features.name: mobile apps
features.description: Native iOS and Android clients.
features.evidence_quote: iOS Release Notes / Android Release Notes

features.name: desktop apps
features.description: Native Mac, Windows, and Linux clients.
features.evidence_quote: Mac Release Notes / Windows Release Notes / Linux Release Notes

differentiators: Agentic AI platform built into a messaging surface (Slackbot + Agentforce)
MCP-native integration with partner apps and enterprise tools
Slack Connect for cross-org shared channels
Enterprise Key Management with customer-controlled keys
Deep Salesforce integration as a Salesforce company

recent_ships.what: Partner Apps MCP — connect tools directly to Slackbot for live data
recent_ships.source: Partner Apps MCP, and more — See what's new

recent_ships.what: Slackbot MCP integrations with Google, Atlassian, Box, Notion, DocuSign
recent_ships.source: Slackbot uses MCP to reach the tools your team already runs on

recent_ships.what: Slackbot Memory — persistent memory across conversations
recent_ships.source: Slackbot Memory — Other AI remembers what you told it.
Slackbot Voice Dictation — you can now just say it out loud

praised: Broad third-party app ecosystem and integrations
complaints: Steep price increases for larger accounts — 'Slack has raised our charges by $195k per year'
WYSIWYG input box regression — 'Slack's new WYSIWYG input box is terrible'
Forums preferred over Slack/Discord for developer community support
Deprecation of open standards — 'Slack decides to close down IRC and XMPP gateways'
Account closures for users in sanctioned regions — 'Slack closes account of an Iranian user living in Canada'

free_tier.limits: 90-day message history; basic integrations; standard login

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Basics: channels, DMs, 90-day history, standard login

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited message history, unlimited integrations, Slack Connect DMs

tiers.name: Business+
tiers.headline_inclusions: SSO, user provisioning (SCIM), compliance exports, 99.99% uptime SLA

tiers.name: Enterprise Grid
tiers.headline_inclusions: Multi-workspace management, DLP, HIPAA, EKM, Enterprise Search, Agentforce
